main.description: Relay-authenticated callback an app implements. The relay tells the app that a user's notification subscription to it changed (enabled/disabled). The token's `iss` is the relay DID — the app MUST verify the issuer is the relay, in addition to signature/aud/lxm.

recipient.description: The user who enabled/disabled notifications from this app.

enabled.description: true = the user granted; false = revoked.

changedAt.description: When the grant changed — lets the app resolve out-of-order callbacks.
